html:
A Bird Trap is an Item used to catch Birds. It is crafted using 3 Twigs and 4 Silk and requires a Science Machine to prototype. Bird Traps can be baited with Seeds to significantly increase the chance of catching a Bird, though it is not a requirement. Using a Feather Hat will increase the number of birds landing to speed up the process.

Besides Seeds, a lot of other food and even non-edible items can be used as bait, such as Meat, Carrot, Halloween Candies, Flint and Gems. A baited Bird Trap has a 50% chance to catch a bird when the area is unloaded and loaded again.

Contents

  • 1 Skins
  • 2 Tips
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Bugs
  • 5 Assets
  • 6 Gallery

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Art Nouveau Collection
Nouveau Bird Trap
A cage even the birds will admire.

Tips

  • Creatures that cannot be caught in the Trap can still eat or steal items used as bait in the Bird Trap. Traps with baits should be placed away from Pigs (omnivore) and Gobblers (herbivore) in order for them to be more effective.

Trivia

  • Following the Naughty and Nice update, Feathers and Morsels can no longer be acquired directly using the Trap. Instead, murdering the Bird while it's in the Inventory is now necessary.
  • In the old science system, the Bird Trap used to cost 30 Research Points to craft.

Bugs

  • Sometimes Birds will glitch out of Traps after being caught.
  • If the Bird Trap is picked up right as it catches a Bird, the Bird may disappear.
  • Sometimes the Trap will turn invisible, but will still be shown on the map. The player can press space when near it to get it back.

Assets

Bird TrapNouveau Bird Trap

  • Normal
  • Brokened
  • Used

  • Normal

  • Used

Gallery

  • A placed Bird Trap.
  • Bird Trap icon on the Map.
  • An empty Trap (left) and an occupied Trap (right).
  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

"birdtrap"
“Gives me a net advantage!”
–Wilson
“Gonna catch those creepy birds.”
–Willow
“This will catch bird!”
–Wolfgang
“Sticks and silk turned lethal.”
–Wendy
“STUPID BIRDS. HA.”
–WX-78
“A simple clap-trap for birds.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'll show those birds yet!”
–Woodie
“They keep falling for it!”
–Maxwell
“I'm a cunning raven catcher!”
–Wigfrid
“Come to our web trap, birds!”
–Webber
“Oh, roast bird! Hm, don't get ahead of yourself, Warly...”
–Warly
“Tweeter Nabber”
–Wormwood
“Birds of a feather get trapped together.”
–Winona
“The birds will find this so funny!”
–Wortox
“Catch birdies!”
–Wurt
“A bird trap! Classic survival stuff!”
–Walter
“Thankfully, birds are stupid.”
–Wanda
